mods.name: Shinra Meter (Classic+)
mods.author: TERA-Europe-Classic, based on Gothos/neowutran/michaelcarno/LukasTD lineage
mods.short_description: Real-time DPS overlay and encounter log for TERA Classic+.
mods.long_description:
Shinra Meter reads decrypted game packets over a local mirror socket (127.0.0.1:7803) exposed by the Classic+ launcher's Noctenium proxy. It does NOT perform wire-level packet capture, so no WinPcap/Npcap driver is required.

Features:
- Live DPS overlay (per-player, per-skill, per-encounter)
- Damage / healing / abnormality breakdown
- Encounter log + Excel + 7z-compressed JSON export
- D3D9 in-game overlay
- TTS, Discord RPC, Twitch chat integrations

This Classic+ variant pins the game release version to 10002 (v100.02) so every release-gated packet reader in EachSkillResult / Login / SpawnNpc works correctly against Classic+ wire data.
mods.credits: Originally by Gothos (TeraDamageMeter). Forked by Gl0, Yukikoo, and neowutran (ShinraMeter). Ported to .NET 8 by michaelcarno (Shinra Beta). Continued by LukasTD (Yurian/Evervyn branches). Classic+ connection protocol, v100.02 pinning, telemetry strip, and JSON export fix by TERA-Europe-Classic. Logo: Se7en-Hellas. Opcode dumps: GoneUp, dezmen. Nostrum/companion tooling: Foglio1024.

mods.name: TCC (Classic+)
mods.author: TERA-Europe-Classic, based on Foglio1024/Tera-custom-cooldowns
mods.short_description: Read-only cooldown tracker, party buffs, and boss gauges for TERA Classic+.
mods.long_description:
TCC (Tera Custom Cooldowns) is a multi-purpose UI overlay: class-specific cooldown tracker, group window, class HUD, buff bars, boss gauge, chat window, notification system, and more.

This Classic+ variant is **read-only**. The upstream version brokers many outbound RPCs (LFG accept/decline, Moongourd player lookups, guild BAM webhooks, Firebase/Cloud telemetry, chat slash-commands); all of those are stripped in our fork. What remains reads packets from the launcher's 127.0.0.1:7803 mirror socket and renders the overlay. No outbound game or third-party traffic.

Turn windows on/off in Settings. The meter, cooldown tracker, and group window are the most common picks.
mods.credits: Original by Foglio1024 (https://github.com/Foglio1024/Tera-custom-cooldowns). Discord/Mumble integration design and countless packet fixes by the TCC community. Classic+ variant: read-only strip, v100.02 pinning, ClassicPlusSniffer on 127.0.0.1:7803, compat shims for deleted LFG/Moongourd/Firebase/Cloud/Discord-webhook paths, empty UserControls for deleted XAML tags, Dragablz .NET 4.8 retarget — all by TERA-Europe-Classic.

mods.name: PostProcess — gunner-effect cleanup
mods.author: Псина (community contributor via TERA Europe Classic Discord)
mods.short_description: PostProcess effect tweak shared on the Community UI mods channel.
mods.long_description:
Part of Псина's 'removing gunner from the game' pack — replaces stock PostProcess effects with a cleaner variant. Drop into `S1Game\CookedPC\` (or the Classic+ launcher's Mods folder once the mapper patcher ships in Phase C).

Until auto-patching lands, the launcher just downloads the .gpk and shows it in the Installed list so you always know which file came from where. Copy it into the game manually for now.
mods.license: Unknown — community-shared on Discord without an explicit license. Credit the uploader and use at your own risk.
mods.credits: Uploaded by Псина on the TERA Europe Classic Discord 'Community UI mods :3' channel. If you are the original author and would prefer the entry removed or reattributed, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog. GPK tooling: lunchduck/GPK_RePack; novadrop (vezel-dev) for modern parsing.

mods.name: Monster HP gauge — rainbow party bar
mods.author: Псина (based on miyo-ni's Tumblr concept)
mods.short_description: Restyles the monster HP gauge into a colourful party HP bar layout.
mods.long_description:
Restyles the stock monster HP gauge (`S1UI_GageMonsterHp.gpk`) into the 'rainbow party HP bar' concept. Based on miyo-ni's original Tumblr design post. Drop into `S1Game\CookedPC\` (or the Classic+ launcher's Mods folder once the mapper patcher ships in Phase C).

Until auto-patching lands, the launcher just downloads the .gpk and shows it in the Installed list so you always know which file came from where. Copy it into the game manually for now.
mods.license: Unknown — community-shared on Discord without an explicit license. Credit the uploader and use at your own risk.
mods.credits: Uploaded by Псина on the TERA Europe Classic Discord 'Community UI mods :3' channel. Visual design adapted from miyo-ni's Tumblr post: https://www.tumblr.com/miyo-ni/688571598862794752/rainbow-hp-bar-group-uwu. If you are the original author and would prefer the entry removed or reattributed, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog. GPK tooling: lunchduck/GPK_RePack.
